requirements.name: Recovery audit
remaining: Retry GitHub Actions API
Audit release assets and servers
Complete independent public endpoint proof

requirements.name: Ownership and integration handoff
remaining: Create docs/compliance Website handoff
Record accepted source commits for every imported product claim

requirements.name: Truthful release-state booleans
remaining: Gather integration, deployment, download, signing, and store evidence

requirements.name: Zero-placeholder and zero-fake-success gate
remaining: Run the gate after final commit metadata reconciliation

requirements.name: Authority and source classification
remaining: Publish common source/asOf/version/confidence/failure schema
Apply it to public claims and economic data

requirements.name: Canonical Wallet Auth and Gateway disclosure
remaining: Centrally integrate product registration/introspection and migrate product clients
Complete production recovery and public negative-vector evidence

requirements.name: User asset and permission boundary disclosure
remaining: Implement/audit any selected smart-account and mandate contracts
Prove integrated Quant execution, revocation, kill switch and emergency exit

requirements.name: Provider register and outage truth
remaining: Complete official-source terms, license, jurisdiction, retention, rights, limit and cost reviews for every active provider
Reconcile product-specific provider candidates
Obtain procurement/privacy/security/legal approval

requirements.name: AI governance disclosure
remaining: Complete provider/privacy approvals and central product integration
Verify production consent, cost, audit, red-team and failure semantics

requirements.name: Brand guide and product identity
remaining: Audit legacy names and assets across all public bundles
Generate reviewed light/dark and icon-size assets with rights/digests
Verify Website implementation

requirements.name: Twelve-language and accessibility coverage
remaining: Professionally review terminology and translate runtime/legal/risk content
Verify Arabic RTL and accessibility in the Website and each product

requirements.name: Independent product and platform rationale
remaining: Publish platform applicability matrix
Reconcile preview, simulator, unsigned, signed, and store release classes

requirements.name: SLO capacity and unit economics
remaining: Run representative multi-validator, write-path, soak, failover and provider-degradation tests
Approve economic inputs and service objectives

requirements.name: Migration compatibility backup and sunset
remaining: Run and record representative migration, rollback, export, and restore drills
Approve retention and sunset ownership

requirements.name: Observability and support closure
remaining: Implement and verify missing SLO, saturation, disk, quorum, provider, certificate and error-budget telemetry
Verify production alert, status and support routing

requirements.name: Security and supply-chain package
remaining: Resolve or formally isolate the npm advisory
Run unavailable dedicated vulnerability/SAST/DAST/artifact scanners
Complete artifact-specific licenses, provenance, cross-host reproducibility, signing, download and install evidence

requirements.name: Economics fees and risk transparency
remaining: Complete stablecoin reserve/redemption disclosure
Reconcile newer owner commits and central integration
Obtain economic, governance, security and legal review
Gather public evidence for any activated policy

requirements.name: Public product and SEO handoff
remaining: Create reviewed exact-release screenshots and approved asset variants
Integrate and verify metadata/content/JSON-LD/accessibility in Website

requirements.name: Completion and release evidence set
remaining: Bind the publication commit and rerun the metadata gate
Attach exact-release screenshots/public/runtime/CI/artifact evidence where applicable

requirements.name: Founder KPI framework
remaining: Approve product-specific value events and numeric thresholds after a representative baseline
Implement privacy-reviewed KPI collection and dashboards

requirements.name: One-time operator input request
remaining: External owners provide only the approvals and deployment evidence requested in the generated record

requirements.name: Final validation commit push and remote verification
remaining: Commit and push assigned branch
Verify local and remote SHA
Verify clean worktree
